channel.title: Crt on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Crt on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #1: Elementary Number Theory — GCD, LCM, Euler, CRT
item.description: GCD/LCM properties, Bézout/Frobenius coin problem, Euler’s theorem with power-tower reduction, φ-chain, CRT, congruence system merging, n! prime factorisation.

item.title: Number Theory #4: Primality, Factorisation & Residues (Miller-Rabin, Pollard Rho, Tonelli-Shanks)
item.description: Miller-Rabin primality test, Pollard Rho factorisation, Tonelli-Shanks for quadratic residues, cubic residues via F_p[t]/(t^3-a), quartic residues by double square root, and general k-th residues via primitive root + BSGS, plus N-th residues mod composite.
